ogTitle: Moonee vs Moonee Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moonee and Moonee Beach.
heading: Moonee vs Moonee Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moonee, New South Wales and Moonee Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moonee has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Moonee Beach (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moonee or Moonee Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moonee has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Moonee Beach scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moonee scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Moonee Beach scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moonee or Moonee Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moonee has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
